summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pokemon Card Collection Manager. Backend fully functional with all endpoints working. Frontend working well with minor modal overlay issue during testing.

cors_issues.issue: CORS configuration was initially set to allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True
cors_issues.fix_applied: Updated to allow_origins=['http://localhost:3000'] for proper credential handling

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts clicks on navigation elements when modal is open

design_issues.issue: Preview URL (https://4706d658-0f8c-4a63-a8e4-cbe9ff9f7e2b.preview.emergentagent.com) shows Emergent landing page instead of Pokemon app
design_issues.note: Kubernetes ingress not properly configured for /api routes

passed_tests: Cards CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Pokemon card search with real API results
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Kubernetes ingress configuration to properly route external preview URL to the Pokemon app instead of showing Emergent landing page. The /api routes should be directed to port 8001 and frontend routes to port 3000.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor modal overlay issue
